So the bottom cross only shifts the bottom horizontal row, not the columns. Good.
Now I need to understand the goal. Let me think about what the yellow markers indicate. The 1x1 Y markers form a frame around the center. The 2x2 Y squares are at (17,32) in the top row and (38,23) in the left column.

3. Bottom loop: bottom row + left column (below middle) + right column (below middle) + bottom-most row
